item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a notable decline in recent trading sessions, reflecting broader market pressures and sector-specific challenges. Over the past five days, the index has fallen by 2.7%, with a sharper drop of 2.95% recorded on the latest trading day, signalling a cautious investor sentiment towards smaller companies amid prevailing uncertainties. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness over recent sessions, declining by 1.98% today and nearly 4% over the past five days. This downturn reflects a broad-based sell-off with defensive and cyclical stocks exhibiting contrasting performances, highlighting investor caution amid mixed market signals. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Slide Sharply as Market Breadth Deteriorates Across Sectors
item.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a broad-based sell-off on 12 May 2026, with the Sensex plunging nearly 2% and the Nifty following suit amid weak global cues and subdued investor sentiment. Market breadth deteriorated sharply as all sectors declined, led by a steep fall in the realty segment, while small caps dragged the overall market lower. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The BSE Midcap 150 index has experienced a notable decline, falling by 2.56% on the day and registering a 2.89% drop over the past five trading sessions. This downturn reflects a broad-based weakness across the mid-cap segment, with only a handful of stocks managing to buck the trend amid challenging market conditions. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: D B Corp Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: D B Corp Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 12 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 214, down 7.04% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market, reflecting immediate selling pressure amid a broadly negative market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: DCW Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: DCW Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 12 Jun 2026, touching a low of Rs 46.01, marking a steep fall of 7.54% as the stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market amid prevailing bearish sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Nitco Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: Nitco Ltd experienced significant intraday weakness on 12 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 96.37, down 8.32% from its previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market, reflecting immediate selling pressure amid a broadly negative market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Shalibhadra Finance Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 73.14 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Shalibhadra Finance Ltd closed lower, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 73.14 on 12 May 2026, marking a significant 45.5% decline over the past year despite the company’s steady financial performance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 114.05, reflecting a sharp price pressure of -7.69% as the stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market amid a bearish trading environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd Surges 14.15% to Day's High of Rs 265.2 — Outperforms Sector by 4.96 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex tumbled 1.76% on 12 May 2026, Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd surged 14.15%, touching an intraday high of Rs 265.2. This 4.96 percentage-point outperformance over its IT - Software sector, which declined 3.68%, marks a striking divergence and highlights a stock-specific rally amid broad market weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Novartis India Ltd Surges 7.36% to Day's High of Rs 1275 — Outperforms Sector by 9.05 Percentage Points
item.description: In a session marked by broad market weakness, Novartis India Ltd delivered a standout performance, surging 7.36% to touch a new 52-week high of Rs 1275 on 12 May 2026. This gain outpaced the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector by 9.05 percentage points and contrasted sharply with the Sensex’s 1.76% decline, signalling a distinctly stock-specific rally. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Magnus Steel Leads Micro Cap Rally with Over 1000% Return in Six Months
item.description: Magnus Steel has delivered an extraordinary return of 1008.26% over the past six months, vastly outperforming its micro cap peers and the broader market. This remarkable surge highlights the stock’s strong technical and financial fundamentals, positioning it as a standout performer in the Other Electrical Equipment sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Top Small and Micro Cap Stocks Deliver Exceptional One-Year Returns
item.description: In a remarkable display of market outperformance, several small and micro cap stocks have delivered extraordinary returns over the past year, far surpassing benchmark indices. Leading the pack is Cupid, a small cap FMCG company, which has generated an astonishing 589.38% return, underscoring the potential of select high-quality stocks in niche sectors to reward investors handsomely. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Shares of Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd declined sharply on 12 May 2026, hitting an intraday low of Rs 108.3, reflecting significant price pressure amid a broadly negative market environment. The stock underperformed its sector and the benchmark Sensex, continuing a recent trend of downward movement. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Eureka Forbes Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: Eureka Forbes Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 495.85, reflecting a 6.93% drop as the stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid widespread selling pressure. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Spandana Sphoorty Financial Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Spandana Sphoorty Financial Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 258, reflecting a 6.99% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral headwinds. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 294.1 as the stock faced significant price pressure amid a broadly negative market environment. The aerospace and defence company’s shares fell by 7.46%, underperforming both its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Precision Camshafts Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: Precision Camshafts Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 12 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 158.6, reflecting a sharp price correction of 7.17% during the trading session. This downturn comes amid broader market weakness and sectoral pressures, marking a reversal after four consecutive days of gains. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Godrej Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: Godrej Industries Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 12 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,092.85 as the stock faced significant price pressure amid a broadly negative market environment and sectoral weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: NLC India Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: NLC India Ltd. experienced a significant intraday decline on 12 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 306.8, down 7.1% from the previous close. This underperformance came amid broader market weakness and sectoral pressures, with the stock falling sharply relative to its power sector peers and the benchmark Sensex. Time: 1 hour ago
